product.name: AutoStream
product.tagline: Automated Video Editing Tools for Content Creators
product.description: AutoStream is a SaaS platform that provides automated video editing tools specifically designed for content creators. Our AI-powered platform helps creators edit, caption, and optimize their videos in minutes instead of hours.

plans.name: Basic Plan
plans.best_for: Hobbyist creators just getting started with content creation

plans.name: Pro Plan
features: Advanced auto-editing with AI scene detection
plans.best_for: Professional content creators and agencies who need unlimited output and premium quality

policies.refund: Full refund available within the first 7 days of subscription. No refunds are processed after the 7-day window.

support.basic: Email support during business hours (Mon-Fri, 9 AM - 6 PM EST).
support.pro: 24/7 dedicated support via email, live chat, and phone.

policies.trial: No free trial is currently offered. However, the 7-day refund policy lets you try risk-free.
policies.cancellation: You can cancel your subscription at any time. Access continues until the end of your current billing period.

faq.question: What video formats does AutoStream support?
faq.answer: AutoStream supports MP4, MOV, AVI, and WebM formats for both import and export.

faq.question: Can I upgrade from Basic to Pro mid-cycle?
faq.answer: Yes! You can upgrade at any time. We'll prorate the remaining days on your Basic plan and apply the credit to your Pro subscription.

faq.question: Does AutoStream work with YouTube and TikTok?
faq.answer: Absolutely. AutoStream integrates directly with YouTube, TikTok, Instagram Reels, and Twitter/X for one-click publishing.

faq.question: What are AI captions?
faq.answer: AI captions are automatically generated subtitles powered by advanced speech recognition. They support 30+ languages and are available exclusively on the Pro plan.
